features: Festive Multicolour Patterns: The VINTERFINT gift bags come in assorted cheerful colours, ideal for adding festive flair to your Xmas decorations and holiday gift-giving.

description: Make your holiday gifting easy and festive with the VINTERFINT Christmas Gift Bag Set. This pack of 25 small Xmas decoration gift bags features assorted multicolour patterns, adding a vibrant and cheerful touch to your gift presentation. Each bag measures 10x10 cm, making them perfect for small gifts like jewelry, candies, or party favors. Made from high-quality paper, these gift bags are sturdy and reusable, offering a stylish and eco-friendly alternative to traditional wrapping. Whether you're using them for personal gifts, holiday parties, or as part of your Christmas decorations, these colourful bags will brighten up any holiday celebration.
